steps.title: Find the simple subject
steps.content: The subject is "The village of Panduyacu in Ecuador." The prepositional phrase "in Ecuador" does not change the number of the subject. The head noun "village" is singular.

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: A and D use plural "are," and B uses plural "have." Each disagrees with the singular subject "village." The verb must be singular. The answer is C.
